event: Martyrdom of Saint Catherine of Alexandria
symbols: breaking wheel — the instrument of torture miraculously shattered by divine intervention
executioner with sword — the worldly power that persecutes the faithful
angel descending — divine intervention and comfort for the martyr
gold background — the eternal heavenly realm surrounding the temporal suffering
description: A small Gothic panel painting with a gold background within an ornate gilded frame with trefoil arch. The scene shows a female saint (Catherine) kneeling at lower left beside a broken wheel, while an executioner raises a sword or club against her from the right. Above, a small angel in blue descends from heaven. A dark tree stands at the left. The painting style is characteristic of Italian Gothic panel painting with flat gold background, small figures, and vivid but limited color palette.
